repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
contents_tesim: The troparia (εἰς τὴν λειτουργίαν) are arranged according to the system of the eight modes. What is preserved goes from Saturday of tone 2 to Sunday of tone 6 (Rossetto)
full_text_tesim: The Schriftspiegel is approximately 175x90 mm. What remains of the upper margin measures 6 mm, while the outer margin measures 30 mm and the lower 20 mm (f. 101r). The original manuscript measured approximately 190x130 mm
The text is arranged in a single column with 30 or 31 lines per page and a distance between lines of 5 mm
The troparia (εἰς τὴν λειτουργίαν) are arranged according to the system of the eight modes. What is preserved goes from Saturday of tone 2 to Sunday of tone 6 (Rossetto)
